task: Survey the backend directory of this SaaS starter kit. List the top-level structure, then look inside backend/ for: apps, models, API structure, authentication setup, settings/config files, Celery tasks, and any existing AI/agent-related code. Read key files like pyproject.toml, backend/settings or config files, and any README or docs. Provide a comprehensive structured summary of what the backend offers.
